description: Extend qualified assistance RECAP with only persistent surface-world state

replacements.old:
<COND (,WON-FLAG
	       <SET SEEN T>
	       <TELL "- Your discoveries have opened the final path southwest of the house." CR>)>
	<COND (<NOT .SEEN>
replacements.new:
<COND (,WON-FLAG
	       <SET SEEN T>
	       <TELL "- Your discoveries have opened the final path southwest of the house." CR>)>
	<COND (<SURFACE-RECAP> <SET SEEN T>)>
	<COND (<NOT .SEEN>
